title: The Taste of Her Pork Miso Soup
overview: Literature or pornography? That's the question of the hour as a racy book sparks the spirit of discovery in the members of a high school literature club.

title: Es-Ee-Ecks
overview: Niina wants Kazusa to say WHAT?. Later, Sonezaki demands that each member of the club come up with ten alternative terms for "sex" - but acronyms get the better of her.

title: Willy's Real Rear Wheel
overview: Hongo makes a shocking discovery at a local bookstore - but it pales in comparison to the discovery she later makes at Shibuya Station.

title: The Purpose of Books
overview: Sonezaki's new look causes quite a stir in class (and in the heart of a certain someone).

title: Things That Changed Before We Knew It
overview: Niina encounters a figure from her past. Meanwhile, Momoko isn't sure what to make of Sugimoto, and Kazusa is unsettled by the repetition of a certain word.

title: Maidens in the Woods
overview: As the school festival approaches, the Literature Club is tasked with writing a romantic urban legend. Perhaps a field trip will provide a little inspiration…

title: Jiggling, Then, After
overview: The Literature Club’s field trip spurs confrontation between friends — and an answer to their quest for a convincing urban legend.

title: Legend of Love
overview: Emotions burn bright as the Literature Club reads their urban legend aloud. Will the performance inspire a love confession, or will feelings flicker out?

title: The Orange Fox's Lilies
overview: Ah, being in love. The birds sing more sweetly and the world just seems brighter… but if being in love is so great, why is something as simple as holding hands so difficult?

title: Holes
overview: Hongo might've bitten off more than she can chew with Milo-sensei. Meanwhile, Kazusa contemplates racy underwear, and Momoko's feelings reach a boiling point.

title: Inappropriate Conduct Between the Sexes is Now Forbidden
overview: Niina announces her intentions to Kazusa, but they are swiftly put aside when a misunderstanding threatens to tear the Literature Club apart from the inside out.

title: The Colors of the Hearts of Maidens
overview: Their goal is simple. Their emotions are not. In the dark of night, feelings are brought to light - but will the morning sun shine on ruin or revelation?
